_note: This is a demonstration fixture showing what a successful Gold classification looks like for the sample FDA warning letter. UUIDs are static placeholders — real pipeline runs generate new UUIDs per execution. Values are derived from examples/expected_silver_fda_warning_letter.json and examples/fda_warning_letter_sample.md.

violation_type: Failure to Establish Adequate Laboratory Controls (21 CFR § 211.160(b))
Inadequate Investigation of Out-of-Specification (OOS) Results (21 CFR § 211.192)
Failure to Maintain Adequate Equipment Qualification Records (21 CFR § 211.68)
extracted_fields.summary: The United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) inspected your drug manufacturing facility at 4800 Industrial Parkway, Suite 200, Springfield, IL 62704 during the period of January 8 through January 22, 2025. This inspection was conducted by investigators from the FDA Chicago District Office. Based on our inspection findings, we have determined that your facility is in significant violation of Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) regulations.

export_payload.parsed_text_excerpt:
FDA Warning Letter — Meridian Pharmaceutical Solutions, Inc.

Date: March 14, 2025

Issued to:
Marcus J. Holloway
Chief Executive Officer
Meridian Pharmaceutical Solutions, Inc.
4800 Industrial Parkway, Suite 200
Springfield, IL 62704

District Office: Central Region — Chicago District

Dear Mr. Holloway,

The United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) inspected your drug manufacturing facility...
